hadith_entries.text:
1002. Narrated Abu-Huraira; 'The Messenger of Allah *
forbade that the man performs the prayer with his arms.
akimbo.' (At-Termizi).
Abu-Issa said; The Hadith of Abu-Huraira is Hasan
Saheeh and some of the people of knowledge disliked that the
worshipper performs the prayer with his arms akimbo. They
also disliked doing that even while walking. And it was
narrated that Satan walks with his arms akimbo.'
